segments.text: Alright, stop gambling and start investing. Screener is basically Google for Indian stocks, minus the ads.
segments.fallback_text: Open Screener and start the research.
segments.subtitle: Step 1: Open Screener.in - India's popular stock research platform

segments.text: Type in Reliance. Boom. Straight to the mothership. Clean layout, serious numbers.
segments.fallback_text: Open Reliance and head to the company page.
segments.subtitle: Step 2: Navigate directly to Reliance Industries company page

segments.text: Dashboard time. Market Cap, P/E, ROCE. The whole report card, right in your face.
segments.subtitle: Step 3: View key metrics - market cap, PE ratio, ROCE, and valuation snapshot

segments.text: Quarterly Results. We want up and to the right. If it looks ugly, keep scrolling.
segments.subtitle: Step 4: Review quarterly financial trends to understand recent performance

segments.text: Profit and Loss. Ten years of history in one click. Maximum transparency.
segments.fallback_text: Open profit and loss for the long view.
segments.subtitle: Step 5: Inspect Profit and Loss details - revenue, expenses, and margins

segments.text: Balance Sheet. We want what they own to beat what they owe. Simple math, big impact.
segments.subtitle: Step 6: Check balance sheet strength - assets, liabilities, and equity

segments.text: Do not want to do the math? Hit Screens. It's a best-of playlist for stock filters.
segments.subtitle: Step 7: Open the Public Screens page to explore ready-made stock filters

segments.text: We open the high-growth, low-PE style screen. Ganesh Infra jumps right out of the list.
segments.subtitle: Step 8: Open a public screen to view companies matching prebuilt criteria

segments.text: Compare sales growth and ROE. If the numbers look wild, verify before you celebrate.
segments.fallback_text: Compare growth and ROE in the results.
segments.subtitle: Step 9: Browse filtered companies and compare PE, ROE, and market cap

segments.text: One click on Ganesh Infra and we do the deep dive. Trust, but verify.
segments.fallback_text: Open Ganesh Infra for the deep dive.
segments.subtitle: Step 10: Open Ganesh Infra. from the screen for deeper analysis

segments.text: And that's it. Go research, go compare, and go get those gains.
segments.fallback_text: And that's a wrap for Overpass.
segments.subtitle: Step 11: Tutorial complete - you can now research and compare stocks on Screener.in
